# wirescope runtime dependencies (Python 3.9+).
# Everything else it uses is in the standard library.
# Codex/ChatGPT zstd capture uses stdlib `compression.zstd` (Python 3.14+);
# on older Pythons that capture path degrades gracefully — no extra dep.
#
# Pin FLOORS (not exact, not capped): bare names let a fresh resolver pull
# anything, which is how an unpinned `starlette` landed on 1.x for a consumer
# and broke the removed on_startup= hook. We use only the bedrock API + the
# lifespan context manager (Starlette >=0.21), so any modern release — through
# the 1.x line — works; no upper cap needed.
httpx>=0.27
starlette>=0.21
uvicorn>=0.30
websockets>=10
